ui Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual ui Directory Reference(3)

NAME

ui Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file fps_counter.c
FPS counter implementation using rolling-window timestamp buffer. file frame_buffer.c
Buffered terminal frame rendering implementation. file keyboard_help.c
Keyboard help overlay TUI rendering implementation. file mdns.c
mDNS service discovery UI wrapper for interactive server selection file splash.c
Intro and status screen display implementation with animated rainbow effects. file status.c
Status screen display with live log feed at FPS rate. file terminal_screen.c
Reusable fixedheader+scrollinglogs"terminalscreenabstraction.

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
